subcodes.first_line: O thou true servant of God! The hardships and difficulties thou didst endure in service to thy father and Khan brother and the beloved ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق زحمات و مشقاتی که در خدمت پدر و برادر خان و احبای الهی کشیدی
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
